title: Warm pig to Porse
description: Changes the texture of the warm pig to the pig-horse from Minecraft 2.0, an April fools update.
body:
Makes the warm pig look like the pig-horse from Minecraft 2.0, the 2013 April fools update (because I think they look similar 😁). 

Also from the April fools update:

- Warm cow now has the cow-horse texture
- Cold chicken now has the blue chicken texture
- Blue Eggs now have the diamond texture

### Spot the Difference 🤣
![A pig-horse in front of a lime concrete background](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b49468a5c72089b09a4eb2ab73dfff2c0f942923_0.webp)

![Warm pig in front of a lime concrete background](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/bc957e743155aacb26ae27480aadeba27742df19_0.webp)

![A cow-horse standing in front of a lime green concrete wall](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/23568f3c13060f228fc416eddb1a2b3f241eb907_0.webp)

![A warm cow standing in front of a lime green concrete wall](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/868fa50f64c9b9af1b2d0f36f96d6d1250a621ab_0.webp)

![A blue chicken standing in front of a lime green concrete wall](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c5092432866950d62cbb51d8f9a9f589a10b9e4e_0.webp)

![A cold chicken standing in front of a lime green concrete wall](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/49f34cb2ab36b84a51f422bf01f7c466265026bb_0.webp)

![Blue egg, retextured to a diamond, in front of a lime green concrete background](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/56d0629efe9354f002ed9bbbc2cdff9a48fd6987_0.webp)

![Blue egg, in front of a lime green concrete background](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/87dd435075ea24ff2b9cd219c3d65a2f1d9714f7_0.webp)

# Problem? - BobuarThereIsSomethingWrongWithYourThing@outlook.com
